summary: KalkMate primary brand logo SVG (200x200, traced via potrace) — depicts a stylized calculator-shaped icon with the wordmark 'KMATE' rendered as vector paths.

nodes.name: kalkmate_logo.svg

text_elements.note: Letters are not real <text> elements; they are traced bezier paths produced by potrace from a raster source. Visible letterforms spell 'KMATE' beneath a calculator/device icon containing a small keypad-like grid of rounded rectangles.

visual_elements: inner display area with small triangular/peak marks (possibly representing a mountain or chart, evoking 'mate'/study)
3x2 grid of rounded square keys (calculator buttons)
nodes.usage_context: Public static asset served by the KalkMate marketing/web app (website/public/). Used as the primary brand logo on the site.
